chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 1086 of 2016 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.01.2018 For hearing Mr. Qadir Bux Ghirano, advocate for applicants Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, D.P.G. Learned counsel states that under the instruction of his client, he does not wish to press this application any further. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
